layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with equal-width side-by-side content sections. The slide uses a left-to-right orientation with two major vertical columns separated by a small gutter. Each column contains a section header followed by three vertically-distributed row sections. The layout emphasizes horizontal alignment: all row sections across both columns share identical top and bottom edges, creating a unified grid structure. Thin dashed grey separator lines between rows span the full width of each column, reinforcing the horizontal alignment and creating visual rhythm. The slide has generous padding on all sides, and the content fills the available vertical space evenly. No outer container is used — the columns sit directly on the white slide background. The design is clean, structured, and optimized for side-by-side comparison of Manufacturing KPCs (left) versus J&J core capabilities (right). A full-width key takeaway bar sits at the bottom of the slide, visually separated from the main content.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.45, 0.45, 0.1]

Containers:
  C1 (LEFT COLUMN — Manufacturing KPCs): Left column occupying 45% of slide width, positioned at the left edge of the content area. Contains a bold section header 'Manufacturing KPCs' at the top (brand primary color, body font, left-aligned), followed immediately by a thin solid horizontal line (brand dark color, full column width) as a header underline. Below the header, three row sections are stacked vertically with equal flexGrow values, filling all remaining vertical space in the column. Each row section contains: (1) a large bold enumeration number (brand primary color, left-aligned, proportional to heading size) followed by a bold heading label (brand text color, same line as the number), and (2) body text in regular weight (brand text color, body font, left-aligned, wrapping naturally within the column width). Between each row section, a thin dashed grey horizontal separator line spans the full column width. No separator appears after the last row section. The column has no background fill or border — content sits directly on the white slide background. Vertical distribution is even: row 1 (Game quality), row 2 (Proven performance), and row 3 (Incumbent advantage) each receive equal vertical space.
  C2 (RIGHT COLUMN — J&J core capabilities): Right column occupying 45% of slide width, positioned to the right of the left column with a small gutter (approximately 3% of slide width) separating them. Contains a bold section header 'J&J core capabilities' at the top (brand primary color, body font, left-aligned), followed immediately by a thin solid horizontal line (brand dark color, full column width) as a header underline. Below the header, three row sections are stacked vertically with equal flexGrow values, matching the vertical alignment of the left column's row sections exactly. Each row section contains: (1) a brand-color filled circle bullet marker (small, proportional to body text height) followed by body text in regular weight (brand text color, body font, left-aligned, wrapping naturally within the column width). Each row contains 2 bullet points, stacked vertically within the row section. Between each row section, a thin dashed grey horizontal separator line spans the full column width, positioned at exactly the same vertical position as the corresponding separator in the left column. No separator appears after the last row section. The column has no background fill or border — content sits directly on the white slide background. Row heights match the left column exactly: row 1 aligns with 'Game quality', row 2 aligns with 'Proven performance', and row 3 aligns with 'Incumbent advantage'.
  C3 (KEY TAKEAWAY BAR): Full-width horizontal bar at the bottom of the slide, spanning the entire slide width from left edge to right edge. Fill: light brand accent color (tinted version of brand primary, not saturated). Height: compact — just enough to contain the text with a small vertical inset (approximately 6% of slide height). Text: 'Key takeaway: Though new manufacturing entrants face hurdles to displace incumbent game providers, J&J's core capabilities, strong financial position and brand reputation position the company well to capture share in Minnesota' — body font, brand text color (not white), left-aligned with a small left inset, vertically centered. No border, no rounded corners. The bar sits directly at the bottom of the slide with no margin below it, visually separated from the main content columns by a small vertical gap above it.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): Inactive. The slide content (two columns + key takeaway bar) fills the available space adequately. No decorative background layer is needed.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): Inactive. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are required for this layout.
